description:
Why has US High-Speed Rail never taken off?
Try your first Odoo app for free today 👉 https://bit.ly/3MX9uhf
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/the-time-america-tried-to-beat-the-shinkansen

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/

00:00 - The Starter Pistol
01:24 - The Big Society
02:52 - Early Ideas
06:54 - How to High Speed
08:45 - Coming Off the Rails
10:40 - Metroliner Innovations
12:34 - The Dawn of a New Era
14:24 - Track Trouble
16:18 - Metroliner Epilogue

Additional images and footage: CNR, MCA/Universal Pictures, C-Span, NASA, Emery Gulash, Bell Laboratories.

Follow Get Construction Talking 
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/getconstructiontalking/
X - https://twitter.com/GetConstTalking
LinkedIn - https://www.linkedin.com/company/get-construction-talking/about/

Apple - https://apple.co/3OssZsH
